subtitle: Review execution readiness, dependency realism, and implementation guardrails before coding starts from the pack.

sections.title: Execution Readiness at a Glance
sections.label: Execution Readiness
sections.why: Lead with the pack-level execution read before tasking begins.

sections.title: Dependency and Ownership Matrix
sections.label: Dependency
sections.why: Use a matrix when ordering and ownership realism matter more than prose.

sections.title: Execution Slices and Hand-Offs
sections.label: Execution Slice
sections.why: Keep cross-artifact execution slices dense and easy to compare.

sections.title: Implementation Readiness Checks
sections.label: Readiness Check
sections.why: Frame final execution approval as explicit readiness checks.

sections.title: Blockers and Unresolved Execution Risks
sections.label: Execution Risk
sections.why: Keep blockers and unresolved execution risk visible before implementation starts.

sections.title: Traceability Map
sections.label: Evidence
sections.why: Tie substantive approval claims to exact canonical evidence.

sections.title: Validator Status
sections.label: Validation
sections.why: Show canonical and approval-view validation status together.
